package repository

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_database_access_count_query_before_paged_fetch: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Database access. Flag count queries paired with page fetches on every request without cache or user-visible need.
type CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessCountQueryBeforePagedFetchDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessCountQueryBeforePagedFetchModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessCountQueryBeforePagedFetchRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessCountQueryBeforePagedFetchModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessCountQueryBeforePagedFetchService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessCountQueryBeforePagedFetchRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessCountQueryBeforePagedFetchAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessCountQueryBeforePagedFetch(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessCountQueryBeforePagedFetchDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_database_access"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for _, item := range items { db.Where("id = ?", item.ID).Find(&[]any{}) }
    perf_layer_database_access_count_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "database": 3, "access": 4, "count": 5, "query": 6}
    perf_layer_database_access_count_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_database_access_count_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_database_access_count_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    database_positive_2 := db.Where("database_id = ?", input)
    _ = database_positive_2
    access_positive_3 := perf_layer_database_access_count_positive["access"] + len(input)
    _ = access_positive_3
    count_positive_4 := perf_layer_database_access_count_positive["count"] + len(input)
    _ = count_positive_4
    query_positive_5 := db.Where("query_id = ?", input)
    _ = query_positive_5
    return nil
}
